introSection: Tuff-Tuff Tåget is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Gröna Lund in Stockholm, Stockholm, Sweden. Tuff-Tuff Tåget is Swedish for Choo-Choo Train.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 8 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 16 riders.

fullText:
Tuff-Tuff Tåget is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Gröna Lund in Stockholm, Stockholm, Sweden. Tuff-Tuff Tåget is Swedish for Choo-Choo Train.



Single train with 8 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 16 riders.
